result.finding: Java Maven project with 13 non-test runtime/compile dependencies declared in pom.xml, managed via Spring Boot 3.3.2 parent BOM. Key dependencies include Spring Boot starters, Spring Cloud Azure MySQL, MySQL Connector/J, Caffeine cache, and Thymeleaf.

No Dockerfile to verify COPY/install commands in container
Spring Boot parent BOM (3.3.2) manages most versions
